<thought>
The agent is facing north (up), and the cell directly in front is lava (L). Moving forward would be fatal. To the left is a wall (#), so turning left would not help immediately. To the right is an empty floor (.), which is safe. I will turn right to face east, allowing me to move into the safe floor cell in the next step.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

The cells to the left and right are lava (L) and a wall (#), respectively, so turning would not lead to a safe move. The goal is not yet visible, so moving forward is the best way to explore and possibly reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD

<thought>
The agent is facing north (^). The cell directly ahead is floor (.), which is safe to step on. The cell to the left is lava (L), the cell to the right is a wall (#), and moving backward is not an option. The only safe action to explore and avoid lava/walls is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north (^). The cell directly ahead is a floor (.), which is safe. The cells to the left and right are lava (L) and wall (#), respectively, so turning would not lead to a safe forward move. Moving forward will advance the agent into the open floor area, potentially revealing more of the map and the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north, with a safe floor cell directly ahead. The cell to the left is lava and the cell to the right is a wall, so turning would not lead to a safe forward move. The only safe action is to move forward to explore further and potentially reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north, and the cell directly ahead is a floor (.), which is safe. Turning left would face west, and moving forward would step onto lava (L). Turning right would face east, leading into a wall (#). Therefore, the only safe action is to move forward to explore the floor path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead is a floor (.), which is safe. To the left is lava (L), to the right is a wall (#). The only safe action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead is a wall (#), so moving forward is impossible. To the right (east) is also a wall (#). To the left (west) is a floor (.), which is safe. I need to turn left to face west and then move forward into the open floor path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>
